channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Are Washington's Most Important Gulf Allies on a Collision Course?
item.description: The Saudi-UAE rivalry will shape the future Middle East.

item.title: Suspect dead after opening fire near White House security checkpoint, Secret Service says
item.description: A person who opened fire Saturday on a White House security checkpoint is dead after being shot by officers who returned fire, the U.S. Secret Service...

item.title: The Next Generation of Conservative Leaders Must Embrace Civility
item.description: In his forthcoming book, the former vice president explains why public figures have a responsibility to engage in the art of compromise.

item.title: What Makes an Excellent Children's Treasury
